scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:planner" "npm run dev:progress" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.seed: npm run seed:postgres && npm run seed:mongo
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=frontend && npm install --workspace=services/auth-service && npm install --workspace=services/planner-service && npm install --workspace=services/progress-service && npm install --workspace=services/ai-service && npm install --workspace=services/gateway-service && npm install --workspace=services/shared-rest
